ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams created by the user */,
  "favorite_league" INTEGER /* Favorite league of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Description of the scoring system used */,
  "max_teams" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams allowed in the league */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the league is active */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* Commissioner of the league */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize money for the league */,
  "prize_distribution" TEXT /* Prize money distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league in which the team participates */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "favorite_player" INTEGER /* Favorite player of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Team that the player is currently part of */,
  "avg_points" REAL /* Average points scored by the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* Image of the player */,
  "player_birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the player */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Injuries of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the stats */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league in which the stats are recorded */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player in the week */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the season */,
  "stat_category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team-player association */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team to which the player belongs */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player in the team */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team being ranked */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the team in the league */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "last_week_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the previous week */,
  "rank_increase" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous week */,
  "ranking_category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, draft) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being traded or acquired */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the message was sent */,
  "message_category" TEXT /* Category of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "notification_category" TEXT /* Category of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the settings belong to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing the feedback */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the user */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
